![Image 3: Autolang](https://autolang.vercel.app/images/autolang.png)Autolang

An ultra-low latency, strictly-typed scripting language designed for modern AI Agents and Embedded Systems. Built with a zero-trust membrane architecture.

[Created by hoansdz](https://www.facebook.com/ngoc.hoan.290402)[Sponsored by![Image 4: ADA GROUP — Sponsor](https://autolang.vercel.app/images/sponsor-logo.jpg)](https://adagroup.com.vn/)
